title: sedum eriocarpum subsp. spathulifolium
intro: Sedum eriocarpum subsp. spathulifolium, also known as the Spoon-leaved Stonecrop, is a subspecies of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sedum eriocarpum subsp. spathulifolium include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
